markets.primary_market: Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Naples, Bonita Springs

brand.notes: #D32F2F (red) and #1565C0 (blue) from remax.com CSS custom properties. RE/MAX is the classic red/white/blue 'above the competition' balloon brand. Red is the dominant mark color. Specific Lee/Collier offices trade as RE/MAX Realty Group, RE/MAX Quality Service, etc. — all use the parent brand system.
